title: About Head Lice
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Head lice are parasitic insects found mostly on the scalp, with possible eyebrow or eyelash involvement.
Head lice spread through close contact and do not indicate poor hygiene.
Over-the-counter and prescription medicines can treat head lice infestation.
Eyebrow, eyelash, body, or pubic lice require a different pathway than uncomplicated scalp lice.
